raw.subject: Your Erlanger page caught my eye, NKY Paw Pals - Luxury Pet Sitters Boarding
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed the heartwarming posts about providing more humane accommodations for pets in your care, like the recent photo of a cozy evening setting. It's clear you're dedicated to giving them a second home.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers, like those searching for pet services online, without a clear way to learn more about your services or book an appointment.

I sketched a simple homepage idea from some of the photos and posts you share on Facebook, including a section for your grooming services and a photo gallery showcasing the happy moments you create for pets and their owners. You can check it out here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/nky-paw-pals-luxury-pet-sitters-boarding-erlanger

This is just a starting point, but it could be a great way to present your business and services to a wider audience. Building out a website is a straightforward project, and I'd be happy to discuss a flat fee for local businesses like yours if you're interested in exploring this further. You can simply reply to this email or give me a quick call to get started.
